subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Book. There is no doubt that it hath been sent down from  the Throne of thy Lord, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, and therein are mysteries revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الکتاب لا ریب انه نزل عن جهه عرش ربک المهیمن القیوم و فیه نزل اسرار
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @predictions and prophecies, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
